center.name: 火地岛省 (阿根廷)
center.summary: 火地岛省 (阿根廷)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-chinned siskin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Chile from the Atacama Region south to the southernmost Magallanes Region, in Argentina from southern Mendoza and La Pampa provinces to Tierra del Fuego, and on the Falkland Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Chile from the Atacama Region south to the southernmost Magallanes Region, in Argentina from southern Mendoza and La Pampa provinces to Tierra del Fuego, and on the Falkland Islands
